WORLD CUP 2026

WORLD CUP

11 JUN - 19 JUL
FROM FREE ENTRY

BOOK NOW

Whatever country you’re backing, make Big Penny Social your home for this year’s World Cup! England matches will be ticketed events, while all non-England fixtures are free to attend — simply book a table below to secure your spot.

Due to the time difference with the tournament being broadcast live from America, Mexico and Canada, we won’t be able to show every fixture. Check out the list below to see which matches we’ll be screening.

FIXTURES

All other group stages can be booked using the widget below the fixtures list. 

Thu 11 Jun - 8pm - Mexico v South Africa
Fri 12 Jun - 8pm - Canada v Bosnia & Herzegovina
Sat 13 Jun - 8pm - Qatar v Switzerland
Sat 13 Jun - 11pm - Brazil v Morocco
Sun 14 Jun - 6pm - Germany v Curaçao
Mon 15 Jun - 5pm - Spain v Cape Verde
Mon 15 Jun - 8pm - Belgium v Egypt
Tue 16 Jun - 8pm - France v Senegal
Tue 16 Jun - 11pm - Iraq v Norway
Wed 17 - 6pm - Portugal v DR Congo
Wed 17 Jun - 9pm - England v Croatia
Thu 18 Jun - 5pm - Czech Republic v South Africa
Thu 18 Jun - 8pm - Switzerland v Bosnia & Herzegovina
Fri 19 Jun - 8pm - USA v Australia
Fri 19 Jun - 11pm - Scotland v Morocco
Sat 20 Jun - 6pm - Netherlands v Sweden
Sat 20 Jun - 9pm - Germany v Ivory Coast
Sun 21 Jun - 5pm - Spain v Saudi Arabia
Mon 22 Jun -6pm -  Argentina v Austria
Mon 22 Jun - 10pm - France v Iraq
Tue 23 Jun - 9pm - England v Ghana
Tue 23 Jun - 6pm - Portugal v Uzbekistan
Wed 24 Jun - 8pm - Switzerland v Canada
Wed 24 Jun - 8pm - Bosnia & Herzegovina v Qatar
Wed 24 Jun - 11pm - Scotland v Brazil
Wed 24 Jun - 11pm - Morocco v Haiti
Thu 25 Jun - 9pm - Curaçao v Ivory Coast
Thu 25 Jun - 9pm - Ecuador v Germany
Fri 26 Jun - 8pm - Norway v France
Fri 26 Jun - 8pm - Senegal v Iraq
Sat 27 Jun - 10pm - Panama v England
